description: This pipeline imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin and adds data annotations that contain the image properties. It starts by importing images, then annotates these images with their properties.

12383c00-21a4-4d7e-b4fc-e717083a1c76.description: Imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin

6da603a0-2098-4232-a05a-77d9edfcebcf.name: image-properties-to-annotation
6da603a0-2098-4232-a05a-77d9edfcebcf.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.
